Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Samara's ring]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Samara’s ring casts an eerie light in the Hall of Healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Samara's ring was in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Samara's ring was visible in the sky when Whitehall reached the Ancestor's Tomb.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Samara's Ring provides light.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Samara's ring is an object that fades into a dusty arc of white around the eastern mountain's peak at sunrise.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is excited by the idea of seeing Samara's ring in the distance.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Samara's ring is a beautiful object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Samara’s ring shines as the sun begins to set.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Titan seemed to be drawn to Samara’s ring.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Samara's ring is a ring around the mountain to the east.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Samara’s ring is now fueled by different aspects of madra due to a power shift beneath the valley.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Samara’s ring crackles blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Dreadgod's halo resembles Samara’s ring.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Samara’s ring provides light in the forest.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
